title: Durable Long-Running Work and Operations · Recovery Bay
summary: Operate a multi-hour or multi-day agent task through interruptions. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a durable runbook and restartable workflow and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate durable orchestration state from ephemeral model turns.
Use scheduled checks or heartbeats only when timing or external state requires them.
Wait or subscribe for expected external changes without classifying unchanged state as failure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
